name: weeping_angel
title: Weeping Angel Arena
description: Adversarial timestomp game: Angels (red) forge file timestamps only when unobserved; an out-of-band recorder (blue) catches them under a coverage budget. A staging cost makes acting require exposure, so there is no dominant strategy.

angels.description: Red-only. [id, file, status, armed] per Angel; status 0=lurk, 1=caught, 2=corrupt.

coverageLog.description: Blue-only. [tick, file, kind] on covered files; kind 0=activity, 1=catch.

action.description: Blue: file indices to cover. Red: Angel ids to stomp.
